description_long: This is a modern, tactical bullpup rifle with a compact, streamlined design and a matte black finish. The main body is constructed from polymer and metal, featuring a robust upper receiver with angular, armored panels and a lower receiver with an integrated pistol grip and trigger guard. The rifle has a short, thick barrel that is partially shrouded, and the magazine is housed behind the grip, characteristic of the bullpup configuration. There are multiple rails and mounting points along the top and underside for accessories such as optics, lights, or grips. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, providing a solid shoulder rest without extending the overall length. The overall appearance is utilitarian and futuristic, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a robust, angular body and integrated stock, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the integrated stock, pistol grip, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the narrow, streamlined width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with visible rails and the bullpup magazine placement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the compact, solid construction.
